options.name: <name>
options.description: Specify the name of the activity file.

options.name: -block
options.description: Specifies the name of the VCD/FSDB/TCF/SHM/PHY block to map a sub-block activity file with a top level Verilog/Def file.

options.name: -end
options.description: Specifies the end time as time-value pairs to report the average power across non-overlapping multiple windows specified in the VCD/FSDB/SHM/PHY file for a block, level of hierarchy, or other part of the design.

options.name: -format
options.description: Specifies the net activity of the design using an activity file in VCD, TCF, FSDB, PHY or SAIF format.

options.name: -hier_separator
options.description: Specifies the separator character in the hierarchical net names, bus names, and pin names for the block or other part of the design.

options.name: -name_mapping_rule
options.description: Specifies the input rule-based mapping to map RTL vectors to gate-level netlist. These rules will apply to all the RTL activity files specified.

options.name: -reset
options.description: Specifies to reset and ignore all the previous activity files.

options.name: -rtl
options.description: This option should be set when RTL vector is specified.

options.name: -scale_duration
options.description: Scales the VCD/FSDB/TCF/SHM/PHY duration value by the specified scale factor.

options.name: -scope
options.description: Specifies the VCD/FSDB/TCF/SHM/PHY scope, that is, the name of the module within the activity file associated with the block or other part of the design.

options.name: -set_net_freq
options.description: This option should be set when an activity from a VCD/FSDB/TCF/SHM/PHY file needs to be used to capture net frequency for signal EM analysis. Default : false

options.name: -start
options.description: Specifies the start time as time-value pairs to report the average power across non-overlapping multiple windows specified in the VCD/FSDB/SHM/PHY file for a block, level of hierarchy, or other part of the design.

options.name: -start_time_shift
options.description: Specifies to shift the start time of the specified activity files.

options.name: -weight
options.description: Specifies the weight number of the TCF file. Default : 1.0

options.name: -zero_delay
options.description: This option should be set when Zero Delay Vector File is specified.
